name: Shanxi Taigang Stainless Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanxi Taigang Stainless Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sales of iron and steel in China and internationally. The company's products include cold silicon steel, carbon steel hot rolled coil/plate, train axle steel, alloy mould steel, military steel, etc. It also offers stainless steel, slab, black ingot, black metal, ferroalloy, metalware, and other steel products. In addition, the company is involved in the export and import of raw material for iron and steel production. Its products are used in petroleum, chemical, shipbuilding, container, railway, automobile, urban light rail, power generation, spacecraft, and other sectors and industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taiyuan, China. Shanxi Taigang Stainless Steel Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Taiyuan Iron & Steel (Group) Co., Ltd.
